questionText: Can you provide embodied carbon emissions data for any of your organization's new construction or major renovation projects completed in the last three years?
questionKo: 지난 3년 동안 완성된 귀사의 신축 또는 주요 재건축 프로젝트에 대한 내재된 탄소 배출량 데이터를 제공할 수 있습니까?
simpleHelp:
Consideration of embodied carbon at the initial design and construction stages is necessary in order to achieve the required GHG reductions. The relative significance of embodied carbon is increasing, due to the decarbonization of the grid and increased operational efficiency of buildings.
This and the follow-up question provide investors and other data users with information on the embodied carbon of buildings that your organization completed in the last three years or the reasons you are not able to calculate or disclose this data.

columns.text: Ability to disclose embodied carbon emissions
options: We do not have any new construction or major renovation projects completed in the last three years
optionsKo: 당사 아님 해당 신규 건설 또는 프로젝트 완료 최근 3개 년

guidance.textKo: 전년 대비 변경사항은 2026 CDP 원문 및 변경 추적표 기준으로 확인하십시오.

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Yes, quantitative assessment" or "Yes, both qualitative and quantitative assessment" in response to 7.72.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.

guidance.text:
General 
Indicate if you are able to disclose the results of your embodied carbon assessments for buildings (new construction or major renovation) completed in the last three years. If you respond "Yes", you will be requested to provide details in the following question.
Comment (column 2) (optional) 
If you selected "No", you may explain here why you cannot disclose the embodied emissions of your projects.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 CDP가 요청하는 작성 내용을 설명합니다. 위 응답방법, 열 구조, 드롭다운 선택지를 기준으로 보고연도와 조직 범위에 맞는 정보를 입력하십시오.

guidance.text:
"Bringing Embodied Carbon Upfront: Coordinated action for the building and construction sector to tackle embodied carbon" (2019) - the World Green Building Council's "call to action" report on embodied carbon that aims to spark a global conversation around the value and importance of reaching net zero embodied carbon; adopt a common language, definition, principles, milestones and feasible actions that can be used by all parts of the value chain.
" The Embodied Carbon Review "(Bionova Ltd, 2018) - global review of the status quo of construction sector embodied carbon reduction approaches. The report details how the embodied carbon, that is, the carbon emissions from construction materials, is addressed in certifications and regulations globally.
" Embodied Carbon - Practical Guidance " (2017) - developed by the UK Green Building Council, this guide is designed for those who need to write effective briefs for commissioning their first embodied carbon measurements, but who may be at an early stage of embodied carbon knowledge. The guidance explains some of the basics of embodied carbon, gives an overview of some suggested approaches and gives practical tips on how to use the outcomes of an assessment.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 응답 작성 시 참고할 수 있는 추가 설명입니다. 필요한 경우 관련 기준, 방법론, 내부 검토 자료를 근거로 활용하십시오.

guidance.text: Embodied carbon : Refers to emissions that arise from producing, procuring and installing the materials and components that make up a structure. It may also include the lifetime emissions from maintenance, repair, replacement and ultimately demolition and disposal.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항에서 사용하는 주요 용어의 의미를 설명합니다. 용어 해석은 CDP 2026 원문과 국문 양식의 용어 사용을 우선 적용하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
Any option selected in column 'Ability to disclose embodied carbon emissions' - 2 points
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
‘Yes' selected in column 'Ability to disclose embodied carbon emissions' - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'We do not have any new construction or major renovation projects completed in the last three years' selected in column 'Ability to disclose embodied carbon emissions' - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:

A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this question.

change.q2025_text: Can you provide embodied carbon emissions data for any of your organization's new construction or major renovation projects completed in the last three years?
change.change_summary: New dropdown option added: "We do not have any new construction or major renovation projects completed in the last three years"
change.scoring_change_summary: CC Construction and Real estate Management • ROUTE B added with 0/0 point allocation for the selection 'We do not have any new construction or major renovation projects completed in the last three years' To provide a scoring pathway for organizations who have not completed projects within the last 3 years, despite having life-cycle analysis processes in place.
change.daml_summary:
Construction: D 2/2 | A 0/0 | M 0 or 1/0 or 1 | L 0/0
Real estate: D 2/2 | A 0/0 | M 0 or 1/0 or 1 | L 0/0

sourceInfo.name: CDP Full Corporate Questionnaire and Reporting Guidance 2026
sourceInfo.nameKo: CDP 2026 전체 기업 문항 및 보고 가이던스

sourceInfo.name: CDP Climate Change Scoring Essential Criteria 2026

simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 '지난 3년 동안 완성된 귀사의 신축 또는 주요 재건축 프로젝트에 대한 내재된 탄소 배출량 데이터를 제공할 수 있습니까?'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. CDP 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.
translationSourceKo: 2025 CDP 국문 양식 및 2026 CDP 원문 기준 국문 보정
